features: Super Soft Material: Our spa facial headband are premium soft and skin-friendly coral fleece material, comfortable to wear, super fluffy and durable, provides outstanding touch feeling and hygroscopicity. It can be washed repeatedly without deformation.

Stylish Bownot Design: The makeup headband has a fashionable bow design, and you will look sweeter and cuter when wearing it. There are 4 different color hairbands to meet your diverse needs. You will enjoy life with our makeup headbands.

Highly Elastic: The length of the spa headband is 20cm/7.87 inches and the width is 5.5cm/2.17 inches, the circumference can be stretched to approx. 66cm/13 inches. The highly elastic headband can be stretched to the desired size, suitable for most people, easy to wear.

Super-fast Water Absorption: Spa headbands for women has the ability to quickly absorb water and is a good partner in your life. You can avoid the trouble caused by water droplets getting your hair wet when wearing it. Super-fast water absorption headband keeps you dry and perfectly styled.

Wide Applications: The skincare headband works great to keep your hair out of your face when brushing teeth, washing face or any time, keeping your face neat all the time. It can be a headband for makeup, also can be a cute sports headband and sweatband for women and girls, or a beautiful gift for family or friends.
description: Product description Material: Coral fleece Color: White, Pink, Blue, Leopard Length: The length of the spa headband is 20cm/7.87 inches and the width is 5.5cm/2.17 inches, the circumference can be stretched to approx. 66cm/13 inches. Package includes: 4 pieces Spa Headbands in different colors Suitable for: Suitable for doing spa, applying facial mask, yoga, sports, washing face, taking shower and makeup and much more. Directions To use the hair band, choose a headband in the desired color, stretch it to the desired size and wrap it around your head to keep your hair away from your face. Safety Warning Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. See more
